title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model for physical AI trained on video, audio, text, and action data. The company simultaneously released Vera, an agent CPU layer, and Isaac GR00T, a humanoid reference robot, creating an integrated physical AI stack. This represents a shift of AI from software to embodied systems capable of real-world perception and action.
